title: get librarian recommended books
description: Test the GET /api/librarian-books endpoint to verify it returns a successful response with the expected JSON structure containing librarian recommended books from the National Library for Children and Young Adults.

title: search books with valid query and optional page
description: Test the GET /api/search endpoint with a valid query parameter and optional page parameter to ensure it returns successful search results from the Aladin Open API with correct pagination support.

title: search books without query parameter
description: Test the GET /api/search endpoint without the required query parameter to verify that the API returns an appropriate error response indicating the missing required parameter.
